summary: Nice audience recording of a top‑tier 1986 Grateful Dead show.
review: The reviewer praises the audio source as “real nice,” indicating a clear and pleasant listening experience. They also rate the concert as one of the best shows from 1986, suggesting strong musical performance despite no specific song details being mentioned.

ai_rating.rationale: A single 4‑star review highlights both good sound quality and a high‑level show, leading to an overall rating just above four stars.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer describes the audio source as "real nice," implying clear, well‑balanced sound with no noted issues.
